meaning: adj.&adv.<苏格兰>=very Vera 维拉(女子名)
examples: Vera Wang was feted in New York this week at a spectacular dinner.
I don't know, Vera. It's already eleven o'clock.
In Monday's other second-round clashes, Serena's fourth-seeded older sister Venus beat Russia's Vera Zvonareva 7-5 6-3.
Russian fourth seed Vera Zvonareva also went through after beating Ukrainian Kateryna Bondarenko 6-1 6-1.
